name: TabaPay
description: TabaPay — US card push payment network enabling instant disbursements to Visa and Mastercard debit cards for fintechs and gig platforms.

seo.title: TabaPay — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: TabaPay: TabaPay — US card push payment network enabling instant disbursements to Visa and Mastercard debit cards for fintechs and gig platforms.

when_to_use: Instant push-to-debit disbursements for US gig economy platforms
Visa and Mastercard push payments for earned wage access
Real-time insurance claim payouts to consumer debit cards

pros: Strong fit for gig economy payouts
Network of issuers and rails in one API
cons: Card-only — no ACH or wire in same product
Pricing not public without sales call
review.verdict: Specialist push-to-card rails that shine for gig platforms and fintechs needing instant debit disbursements.
review.best_for: US gig platforms and fintechs doing high-volume instant disbursements to debit cards
review.not_for: Businesses needing card acceptance, ACH, or cross-border payouts

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metered billing scales up and down
